_meta.purpose: Detect anomalous tenant-isolation or RBAC denial spikes. A single denial is normal (operator tries the wrong button); a sustained spike indicates either a broken UI flow or an active probe.
_meta.import_to: Datadog Dashboards → New → Import dashboard JSON

title: Uelfy — ACCESS_DENIED
description: Per-reason denial breakdown. Cross-tenant + cross-clinician_ppl spikes ⇒ probe attempt or new tenant misconfiguration.

definition.title: ACCESS_DENIED — count over time, faceted by reason

monitors._purpose: Cross-tenant denial spike — likely an active probe or a misconfigured UI. SEV-2.
monitors.name: Uelfy — cross_tenant ACCESS_DENIED spike
monitors.message:
More than 20 cross-tenant denials in 15 min. Either a probe attempt or a UI bug producing wrong tenant_id in URL params.

Runbook: docs/27-INCIDENT-RESPONSE.md §11.3

monitors._purpose: MFA-required denials elevated — UX regression or stale enrolment.
monitors.name: Uelfy — mfa_required denial rate elevated
monitors.message:
10+ mfa_required denials in 1h. Check that the mfa-enroll flow still completes; tenant admins may need to reset stuck factors.

Runbook: docs/27-INCIDENT-RESPONSE.md §11.3
